allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\Income_Tracker"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "npm" -ArgumentList "run","dev" -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\vite-out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\vite-err.txt"; Start-Sleep 5; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vite-out.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\vite-err.txt" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
